posts.label: Meme 1
posts.overlay_text: me at 3am journaling like i'm about to change my entire life
posts.fb_caption: Raise your hand if 3am journaling hits different than any therapy session 😅 Tag a friend who's been there.

posts.label: Meme 2
posts.overlay_text: me calculating exactly how long to wait before texting him back
posts.fb_caption: Why does getting what you wanted suddenly make you spiral? 😂 Drop a 💀 if this is you during the talking stage.

posts.label: Quote 1
posts.quote: The only journey is the one within.
posts.fb_caption: Sometimes a single line can shift your whole day. ✨ Save this one for a quiet moment. What does your inner journey look like right now? 💜

posts.label: Quote 2
posts.quote: The privilege of a lifetime is to become who you truly are.
posts.fb_caption: This one hits different when you're in the middle of a transformation. 💜 Save it for the days you forget who you're becoming. Share with a friend who's growing.
